g.text: - Isolated execution & WATCH for acceptance\n(NFR-001, C-006)
- Stores: socket/version mappings,\n temp invitations, battle state
All code execution runs in Docker\n(NFR-005, C-009)
Reject empty/malformed JWT (FR-003)\nReturn user info on valid JWT (FR-002)

Default readOnly=true & authorization=false
when project/version missing (FR-008)
Persist mapping only when authorized
and Redis is ready (FR-009)
